Welcome to Day 3 of the 15-Day JavaScript Interview Preparation Series! 🎉
Today, we’re exploring one of the most important concepts in JavaScript — Functions & Scope. A strong understanding of functions is essential for writing reusable, maintainable code and for clearing JavaScript interviews.
📘 Day 3: Functions & Scope
Today’s topics include:
✅ Function Declarations
✅ Function Expressions
✅ Arrow Functions (=>)
✅ Default Parameters
✅ Rest Parameters (…args)
✅ Parameters vs Arguments
✅ Global, Function & Block Scope
✅ IIFE (Immediately Invoked Function Expression)
✅ Hoisting in Functions
✅ var vs let vs const (Quick Revision)
Functions are the building blocks of JavaScript. Understanding how scope, hoisting, and modern function syntax work will help you write cleaner code and confidently answer interview questions.
📌 Save this post for quick revision before your next interview.
